overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy futuristic cyberpunk cityscape, beginning under a massive building with glowing digital billboards, passing pedestrians with umbrellas, navigating around a parked Militech armored vehicle, and continuing along a waterfront promenade past military trucks. The scene features heavy rainfall, wet reflective pavement, and high-end game engine graphics with ray-traced reflections.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the building overhang on wet reflective pavement, passing pedestrians carrying umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person with red umbrella walking toward the camera
person with patterned umbrella walking past on the left

entered.detail: massive dark futuristic building with overhanging upper floors and structural supports
large illuminated advertising screens displaying product images on the building facade
concrete barrier wall with yellow chevron markings separating the walkway from the water
tall modern street lamp with multiple fixtures

segments.scene_description: Walking under the shelter of a massive cyberpunk mega-building with glowing digital billboards overhead. The wet pavement reflects the artificial lighting while pedestrians with umbrellas pass by in the opposite direction. The waterfront barrier runs along the right side, partially visible through the rain.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection area with full sky exposure
navigates around the parked Militech armored SUV at the street corner

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and walking around the parked armored vehicle to continue along the waterfront

notable_agents.action: black Militech armored SUV with red accent lighting parked at the corner

entered.detail: small dark structure with metal shutters and illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into the open rain at a street corner. The camera turns right around a parked Militech armored SUV, passing a small security checkpoint building. The sky is fully visible and grey with heavy rain, while the waterfront barrier recedes into the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront service road with industrial elements

events.description: passing stacked wooden pallets and industrial debris near the waterfront barrier

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the massive military transport truck on the wet pavement, observing the industrial waterfront area

notable_agents.action: large olive drab military transport truck with eight wheels parked along the curb

entered.detail: stack of weathered wooden pallets and industrial materials
metal and wood benches lined along the waterfront path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow waterfront service road flanked by a massive military transport truck on the left and industrial elements on the right. The area is devoid of pedestrians, with only the sound of rain on the wet pavement. Wooden pallets and benches line the path as the camera moves past the parked truck.

events.description: moves past the military truck into open waterfront area with expanded views

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path past the truck, looking out toward the water and distant city structures

entered.detail: distant view of the massive building facade seen from the open waterfront

segments.scene_description: Moving past the military truck into a more open section of the waterfront promenade. The space widens, revealing distant views of the mega-building through the rain. The waterfront barrier continues along the right, now further away, while benches line the path. The area remains quiet and empty in the downpour.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from the sheltered, neon-lit corridors of a cyberpunk mega-building into the desolate, rain-soaked openness of a military waterfront. It begins under the glow of massive digital billboards where wet pavement reflects artificial lights and pedestrians with umbrellas pass by. As the camera emerges from the covered walkway into the heavy grey rain, it turns right to navigate around a parked Militech armored SUV and a small security checkpoint. The scene then shifts onto a narrow service road, flanked by a massive military transport truck and industrial debris, as the crowd disappears and the environment becomes quiet. Finally, the path opens into a wide waterfront promenade, moving past wooden benches and the distant silhouette of the mega-building under a relentless downpour.
